title: Rich Roasted Dutch Berry Crumble
description: A delicious and comforting Dutch dessert featuring frozen mixed berries and a crunchy crumble topping, perfect for a solo dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and yeast
Add the cold butter to the bowl and use a pastry blender to work it into the flour mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs
Stir in the lemon zest, egg, and vanilla extract
In a separate bowl, mix together the thawed frozen mixed berries and rolled oats
Transfer the berry mixture to a 20cm square baking dish
Top the berry mixture with the crumble mixture, spreading it evenly
Bake the crumble in the preheated oven for 35 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is tender
Remove the crumble from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving
Serve the crumble warm, topped with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream if desired
